calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE
Off Calendar Apr-02-2009 Set For Trial On Apr-02-09 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 503

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Apr-02-2009 Continued To Apr-02-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Apr-02-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Scott Robertson Appellant/Defendant, Douglas McNie Respondent/Plaintiff are present.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties are sworn.

Scott Robertson, dba Housing Corps, Inc., Appellant/Defendant, testifies on his own behalf. The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Exhibit 1 - nine page declaraton of Steven W. Yuen
Exhibit 2 - three page declaration of Steven Kronenberg
Exhibit 3 - three page declaration of Jennifer Miranda
Exhibit 4 - three page declaration of William Kronenberg
Exhibit 5 - four page declaration of Douglas McNie
Exhibit 6 - two page notice of motion for attorney's fees
Exhibit 7 - seven page memo of points and authorities
Exhibit 8 - one page memo of costs (summary)
Exhibit 9A - one page deductible liability insurance
Exhibit 9B - one page deductible liability insurance
Exhibit 9C - one page letter from Pennybrook/CAIB Ins. Services

Douglas McNie, dba McGregor Communications, Respondent/Plaintiff, testifies on his own behalf. The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Exhibit A - two page judgment awarding costs and fees

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission.

JUDGE: ROBERT DONDERO, CLERK: MARSHA SMITH, Not Reported (503)
